title: Another crash in getConditionSelectivityEstimator
description:
### Describe the bug
Seems not related to https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/90626, the stack trace is slightly different. cc @hanfei1991 it uses ALTER MODIFY STATISTICS, so maybe related to recent changes there?
### How to reproduce
On a debug build run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
SET query_plan_enable_optimizations = 0;
ALTER TABLE t0 MODIFY STATISTICS c0 TYPE Uniq, CountMin;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (1);
ALTER TABLE t0 MODIFY STATISTICS c0 TYPE CountMin;
ALTER TABLE t0 APPLY DELETED MASK IN PARTITION ID '1';
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'std::exception. Code: 1001, type: std::length_error, e.what() = vector, Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: std::logic_error::logic_error(char const*) @ 0x0000000029fe8db4
1. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/stdexcept:154: std::length_error::length_error[abi:se210105](char const*) @ 0x000000000d985fc9
2. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/stdexcept:243: std::__throw_length_error[abi:se210105](char const*) @ 0x000000000d985f5f
3. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__vector/vector.h:777: ? @ 0x000000000efcd60d
4. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__vector/vector.h:903: ? @ 0x0000000015cdfa23
5. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__vector/vector.h:1361: DB::StatisticsCountMinSketch::deserialize(DB::ReadBuffer&) @ 0x000000001f250631
6. src/Storages/Statistics/Statistics.cpp:270: DB::ColumnStatistics::deserialize(DB::ReadBuffer&) @ 0x000000001f24afd1
7. src/Storages/MergeTree/IMergeTreeDataPart.cpp:918: DB::IMergeTreeDataPart::loadStatistics() const @ 0x000000001ed00014
8. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTreeData.cpp:847: DB::MergeTreeData::getConditionSelectivityEstimator(DB::RangesInDataParts const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) const @ 0x000000001edcbbd7
9. src/Interpreters/InterpreterSelectQuery.cpp:821: DB::InterpreterSelectQuery::InterpreterSelectQuery(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context> const&, std::optional<DB::Pipe>, std::shared_ptr<DB::IStorage> const&, DB::SelectQueryOptions const&, std::vector<String, std::allocator<String>> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageInMemoryMetadata const> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::PreparedSets>)::$_0::operator()(bool) const @ 0x000000001bd0f055
10. src/Interpreters/InterpreterSelectQuery.cpp:948: DB::InterpreterSelectQuery::InterpreterSelectQuery(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context> const&, std::optional<DB::Pipe>, std::shared_ptr<DB::IStorage> const&, DB::SelectQueryOptions const&, std::vector<String, std::allocator<String>> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageInMemoryMetadata const> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::PreparedSets>) @ 0x000000001bd0ad70
11. src/Interpreters/InterpreterSelectQuery.cpp:505: DB::InterpreterSelectQuery::InterpreterSelectQuery(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&, std::optional<DB::Pipe>, std::shared_ptr<DB::IStorage> const&, DB::SelectQueryOptions const&, std::vector<String, std::allocator<String>> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageInMemoryMetadata const> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::PreparedSets>) @ 0x000000001bd0713f
12. src/Interpreters/InterpreterSelectQuery.cpp:346: DB::InterpreterSelectQuery::InterpreterSelectQuery(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IStorage> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageInMemoryMetadata const> const&, DB::SelectQueryOptions const&) @ 0x000000001bd0da35

18. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:765: DB::TCPHandler::runImpl() @ 0x000000001f58b46a
19. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:2861: DB::TCPHandler::run() @ 0x000000001f5a60e4

(version 25.12.1.244 (official build))'.
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 DOUBLE PRECISION);
UPDATE t1 SET c2 = NULL WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL;
DELETE FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE MODIFY STATISTICS with CountMin type
